about.h1Title: Hello there! My name is Luigi, also known as Daevel.
about.introduction: I'm a Frontend Software Engineer. I build modern interfaces using React, Angular, and TypeScript, with a pragmatic approach to code scalability.
about.frontendArchitectureDescription: Clear structures, reusable components, and understandable technical boundaries.
about.userExperienceDescription: Responsive, accessible interfaces aligned with product goals.
about.engineeringQualityDescription: Type safety, linting, performance, and attention to long-term maintainability.
about.approachTitle: The right approach to building web applications

projects.h1Title: Products, experiments, and frontend tools built to solve real problems.
projects.introduction: A selection of project-driven work shaped by concrete goals: from the initial idea to technical decisions and the final experience.

privacyPolicy.h1Title: Privacy notice for this portfolio website.
privacyPolicy.introduction: This page transparently describes which data may be processed while browsing Luigi Avitabile's personal portfolio.
privacyPolicy.dataControllerDescription: The data controller is Luigi Avitabile, Frontend Software Engineer and owner of this portfolio website.
privacyPolicy.dataProcessedDescription: The website may process technical browsing data required for page operation, such as IP address, user agent, request time, and visited URL.
privacyPolicy.purposeDescription: Technical data is used to ensure security, availability, maintenance, and correct operation of the website.
privacyPolicy.cookiesDescription: At the moment, the website does not use profiling cookies, advertising tools, or analytics systems configured directly by the owner.
privacyPolicy.thirdPartiesDescription: The website may be hosted or distributed through technical providers that process log data according to their own privacy policies.
privacyPolicy.rightsDescription: Users may request access, rectification, deletion, restriction, or objection to personal data processing within the limits of applicable law.
privacyPolicy.contactDescription: For privacy-related requests, you can write to

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The requested page does not exist or has not been published yet.

metadata.privacyPolicyDescription: Privacy notice for the personal portfolio of Luigi Avitabile.
